title: Civil & Structural Design
description: Structural analysis and design for buildings, retaining walls, bridges, and infrastructure using modern Nepalese building codes (NBC) and international standards.

title: Architectural Design
description: Thoughtful floor plans, elevations, and 3D visualisations that balance functionality, aesthetics, and the client's vision — from residential homes to community buildings.

title: Construction Supervision
description: On-site resident engineering and quality control from excavation to finishing — ensuring every stage matches the approved design and specification.

title: Soil & Site Analysis
description: Geotechnical investigation, soil testing, and site feasibility studies to inform safe foundation and substructure design.

title: Cost Estimation & BOQ
description: Detailed bill of quantities, rate analysis, and cost plans prepared to enable transparent budgeting and accurate tendering.

title: Documentation & Approvals
description: Municipal submission drawings, legal building permits, and all regulatory documentation managed on your behalf for a smooth approval process.
